title: Opening for Software Engineer at Apollo Telehealth

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Apollo Telehealth
jsonLd.description:
Apollo Telehealth invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Coimbatore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Apollo Telehealth:
Apollo Telehealth is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Telehealth!
